title: Slovakian-Style Fermented Vegetable Salad
description: A refreshing Chinese-inspired salad featuring fermented vegetables, crunchy texture and a hint of Slovakian flair, perfect for a light lunch or snack.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine fermented vegetables, crunchy vegetables, and tomatoes.
2. Add mixed greens and toss gently to combine.
3. In a small bowl, whisk together a simple vinaigrette made from 2 tablespoons soy sauce, 1 tablespoon rice vinegar, and 1 teaspoon sesame oil.
4. Pour the vinaigrette over the salad and toss to coat.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Cover and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow flavors to meld.
7. Serve chilled, garnished with sesame seeds and chopped scallions if desired.
